sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73960" key="o)mfalotomhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀμφᾰλο-τομητέον</orth>, <sense id="n73960.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must sever the navel-string,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.78</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
